message:
test(demo_showcase): Add compile coverage for demo_showcase binary

Add a test that validates the demo_showcase binary compiles successfully.
This ensures CI will fail quickly if the flagship demo binary breaks.

The test:
- Verifies src/bin/demo_showcase.rs exists
- Runs `cargo build --all-features --bin demo_showcase`
- Fails with clear error message if compilation fails

Closes bd-10de.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
